nodes.content: Work overload, delayed replies, and jealousy around an ex-partner triggered repeated arguments and visible trust erosion.
nodes.label: social_relationships signal T0

classification.rationale: The signal describes interpersonal conflicts and trust issues, indicating moderate relationship strain with some underlying causes.

nodes.content: The relationship is experiencing significant strain due to work-related stress interfering with communication, leading to delayed replies that fuel jealousy and trust erosion. Repeated arguments have created visible damage to the relationship foundation, though repair capacity remains available if addressed promptly.
nodes.label: social_relationships inference T0

key_mechanisms: Work stress reduces communication quality, creating feedback loops of misunderstanding
Jealousy amplifies trust erosion when combined with communication breakdowns
Repeated arguments deplete repair capacity while increasing breakup risk
Delayed replies create perception gaps that exacerbate existing insecurities

violations.description: Null-policy rollout triggered a hard stop
Shock on resource breakup_risk does not decay
Shock on resource communication_quality does not decay
Shock on resource jealousy_pressure does not decay

nodes.content: The couple started weekly check-ins, apologized openly, and agreed to counseling after one long honest conversation.
nodes.label: social_relationships signal T1

classification.rationale: The couple is actively repairing their relationship through structured communication and professional help.

nodes.content: The couple has initiated concrete repair actions including weekly check-ins, open apologies, and counseling agreements following an honest conversation. This represents a significant positive shift from the previous strained state, directly addressing communication breakdowns and trust erosion through structured interventions.
nodes.label: social_relationships inference T1

key_mechanisms: Weekly check-ins establish regular communication patterns that counteract previous delays and misunderstandings
Open apologies directly address trust erosion and demonstrate commitment to repair
Counseling agreement provides professional support to navigate underlying issues like jealousy and work stress
Honest conversation creates a foundation for transparency that reduces perception gaps and insecurity
